selected_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
selected_segments.text: solar is the tip of the iceberg.

selected_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
selected_segments.text: Solar is one component of a complete solution for whether it's a homeowner or a business owner.

selected_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
selected_segments.text: we just installed a commercial, solar installation in Indio, California, where we used a rooftop tracking system, and that tracking system actually enhanced the production of the solar panels by 40% in that application.

selected_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
selected_segments.text: As a customer, you're if you're going to buy a solar system, your goal should really be energy independence first and then secondarily, how much can you save compared to your existing utility bill?

selected_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
selected_segments.text: But if they really looked at it holistically and they saw all the other features combined, it's a no brainer for most people.

selected_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
selected_segments.text: So I don't see clean energy going away anytime soon, especially with the amount of innovation and efficiency that we've been getting from this technology.
